summary: A nostalgic but brief 3‑star review noting personal significance without details on sound or performance
review: The reviewer fondly recalls this as their only live Jerry experience, giving the recording a middling three‑star rating. No specific comments about audio fidelity, setlist, or individual playing are provided, leaving both recording and show quality largely unassessed.
